title: Square a number and observe pass by value

content.problemStatement:
Write a C program with two functions:
- A function doubleValue that takes an integer parameter by value and doubles it.
- A function doubleReference that takes an integer parameter by reference (using pointers) and doubles it.

In main(), read an integer from the user, then call both functions and print the value before and after each call to observe the difference.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Initial value: 5
After doubleValue: 5
After doubleReference: 10

Initial value: 8
After doubleValue: 8
After doubleReference: 16
